form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Back from a spell. Finished off last preparation third in a small field at Queanbeyan Bm66 October 27 over 1000m, soft track; 2.5 len behind Oakeys Choice carrying 60kg at $5.50. Previously first up; fourth of 12 at Moruya Ctry Mdn-Sw July 11 over 1010m, soft track; 4 len behind Sir Franklin with 59kg at $8.50. Good type primed for this with the sharp 1000m trial win, go close.

On jumping, shifted out.
Began awkwardly, shifted in and contacted La Bella Bondi.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. Returns from a 35-day let-up. Most recently won by 1.75 len at Cowra Bm58 March 9 over 950m defeating Zeema with 59.5kg at $3.60. The run before that led but faded 3rd of 11 at Queanbeyan Ctry Bm58 on February 17 over 1000m, 1.3 len behind Marine Girl with 59.5kg at $4.80. Hard fit for this but must overcome the awkward gate, each way.

form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of three-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation sixth of 9 at Moruya Bm58 January 5 over 1010m, 2 len behind Boom In The Dark carrying 58.5kg at $5. Previous preparation first-up won by 0.8 len this track Ctry Mdn-Sw October 30 over 1000m defeating Bomen Babe with 55kg at $3.90. Back without a trial and stays in the mix.

form.formComment: Dual acceptor. Third race start today. When well in the market at debut, won by 2.25 len at this track Mdn March 1 over 1000m in soft going defeating Farsain carrying 58.5kg at $4.20. Last start ran last in a small field at this track Cl1 on March 30 over 1000m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Harry The Thief with 57.5kg at $5.50. Useful type expected to bounce back.

form.formComment: Resuming after a five months break. Finished off last preparation winning won by long-neck Goulburn Bm50 November 8 over 1100m defeating Drama Dodger with 57kg at $3.20. At her first start favourite; won by head Wagga Riverside Mdn-Sw October 4 over 1065m defeating Longreach Drover with 53kg at $5.50. Fitted with the two trials and a forward showing is expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the finishing line, shifted out.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 10th of 12 at Kembla Grange F&M Mdn on November 15 over 1300m, 5 len behind Aura carrying 57.5kg at $19. Returned from break tracked the speed and boxed on steadily; won by 2.25 len at Moruya Mdn-Sw April 4 over 1010m on a rain affected track defeating Silverwater Kid with 56.5kg at $3. Back in great order and can go on with it here.
